name: Jiffy Lube

current_snapshot.parent: Pennzoil-Quaker State Company dba SOPUS Products

initial_fees_by_format.fee_payment_structure: $10,000 at signing + $25,000 on 15th of month after opening

item19_quality.presentation_basis: Net Adjusted Sales (Gross Sales minus promotions, warranty, non-royalty income, national fleet discounts)

gag_clause_evidence.quote_fragment: Franchisees may be parties to confidentiality agreements which may restrict their ability to speak freely about their experience

clauses.obligation: Non-exclusive license to operate one Service Center at specified location using System
clauses.restriction: Cannot operate System at any other location. No rights outside Three Mile Area. Franchisor reserves all rights not expressly granted.

clauses.obligation: Must sign then-current form of franchise agreement (may have materially different terms); complete renovation requirements; satisfy new franchisee qualifications; complete training; pay renewal fee ($10,000 CPI adjusted); release claims
clauses.restriction: No current defaults; no more than 2 cured defaults in previous 5 years; all monetary obligations current
clauses.trigger: Written notice no earlier than 18 months and no later than 12 months before expiration
clauses.exceptions: Renewal term may be modified to coincide with sublease expiration for BTS tenants

clauses.obligation: Pay 4% royalty on Gross Sales monthly (3% if paid on time). 5%/4% if PSA terminates. 0% first 6 months new-to-system. 1% reduction on Multicare tire rubber revenue.
clauses.trigger: Monthly on 15th; first payment 7th month after opening

clauses.obligation: Must obtain JLI approval for any transfer of controlling interest, pledge of FA, equity sale, family transfers. Transferee must sign then-current FA, meet qualifications, complete training.
clauses.restriction: Approval required (may not be unreasonably withheld). Must pay transfer fee. Must pay all outstanding debts. Must release claims.
clauses.right: JLI right of first refusal: 20 days to exercise, 60 days to close, subject to environmental review
clauses.trigger: Intent to accept offer to buy FA or interest
clauses.money: $3,500 transfer fee + actual expenses. Waived for family of deceased/incapacitated.
clauses.exceptions: No transfer fee for non-controlling interest changes; no fee for death/disability family transfers

clauses.trigger: Bankruptcy; failure to locate site/open in time; failure to repair material damage; discontinuation of operations; loss of possession; felony conviction; threat to public safety; unauthorized transfer (by franchisee or equity holder); breach of in-term noncompete; unauthorized disclosure of confidential info; repeated late payments; false reports; repeated unauthorized services

clauses.obligation: Cure default within specified period after written notice
clauses.trigger: Any FA breach not listed in 13.1-13.2; non-payment of debts to JLI/subsidiaries; non-payment of affiliate debts; default under guaranteed loans; breaking/failing to maintain Product Supply Agreement
clauses.duration: Cure period as specified in notice

clauses.obligation: Surrender premises (may be required); surrender trademarked materials; change appearance; discontinue Jiffy Lube name; return all manuals; discontinue confidential info use; discontinue POS software; pay all debts. Return CPUs, VPN routers, credit card machines within 30 days.
Cannot divert business to competitor, engage in substantially similar business in state of service center or within 10 miles of any Jiffy Lube service center in US
Cannot engage in substantially similar business within 10 miles of any Jiffy Lube service center in US
clauses.exceptions: May be limited by state law (CA, ND, MN, WA)

clauses.obligation: Mediation first (CPR Franchise Mediation Program), then arbitration (CPR Fast Track for <$5M, Non-Administered for ≥$5M or injunctive). Venue: Houston, TX.
clauses.restriction: Waiver of jury trial (16.11.7); waiver of punitive damages (16.11.8); disclaimer of consequential damages (16.11.8); 2-year limitation of actions (16.11.6)
clauses.exceptions: Trademark/IP/monies disputes may go to federal court in Houston. State overrides: MN (litigation in MN), ND (ND forum), WA (arbitration in WA), IL (forum outside IL void), MI (arbitration outside MI void)

clauses.obligation: Must maintain insurance coverage as specified by JLI. Estimated annual premium: $10,000-$20,000.
Franchisee indemnifies JLI. JLI indemnifies franchisee for trademark infringement claims (with conditions: 30-day notice, JLI controls litigation).
Corporate franchisee's obligations may be guaranteed by any or all direct and indirect owners. Forms: Individual (Exhibit G), Joint (Exhibit H), Corporate (Exhibit I).
clauses.restriction: Guarantors must also agree to noncompete covenants.

raw.franchisor_competition_rights: May develop other businesses under Marks within/outside ring; no obligation to offer additional franchises

notable_matters: TCC vs JLI/SOPUS LPOH metric arbitration — settled Mar 2025, consent judgment Aug 2025
Najjar arbitration — franchisee contested Pacesetter renewal requirement, hearing Dec 2025
Fuentes no-poach class action — $2M Philadelphia-area class settlement, dismissed May 2024
Enitor arbitration — arbitrator ruled Enitor entitled to renew under non-product form, $521,978 damages

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Item 21 financial statements are image-only — balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, and notes not extracted from text layer
Exhibit B (Franchise Agreement, 213 pages) not directly clause-walked — key operative burdens only via Item 17 summary
Guaranty exhibits (G/H/I) not clause-walked — personal guaranty scope, spousal liability, corporate guaranty scope not directly extracted
Sublease (Exhibit J-1, 40 pages) not clause-walked — lease terms, rent structure, default provisions not directly extracted
Najjar arbitration pending as of FDD date — outcome (Dec 2025 hearing) affects whether JLI can require Pacesetter FA on renewal
